name: Deep Dish Pear Pie with Cheddar Cheese Pastry
recipeInstructions:
1. Place pears in a 1 1/2 quart casserole dish.
2. Sprinkle with lemon juice.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the flour, sugar, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg, and butter. Mix well.
4. Add shredded cheese and salt to the flour mixture. Stir until combined.
5. Gradually add cold water, stirring until dough forms a ball.
6. Roll out the dough to fit the casserole dish.
7. Place the rolled-out dough over the pears, trimming any excess.
8. Dot the top of the pear filling with small pieces of butter.
9. Cover with the chilled cheese pastry and crimp the edges to seal.
10. Cut slits in the top of the pie for steam to escape.
11. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30-40 minutes, or until the pears are tender.
Note: The original recipe text has been rewritten following the specified rules to ensure clarity and consistency while maintaining accuracy.
